name: Orange-Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F and grease a 9-cup Bundt pan with coconut.
2. Add orange zest through the feed tube of an immersion blender, processing until finely chopped.
3. Add sugar and process until the zest is fully incorporated.
4. Process chilled butter cubes in the work bowl, alternating "on" and "off".
5. Add eggs one at a time, vanilla extract, sour cream, and mashed bananas.
6. Sift dry ingredients and combine with batter, processing quickly with several "on/off" turns.
7. Pour batter into the prepared pan and bake for 40-45 minutes or until done. Let rest 8-10 minutes before removing from pan.
Note: The cake stores well and can be frozen. Riper bananas yield a more flavorful cake. Variations include adding chopped dates or chocolate chips, baking in two 8-inch round pans, and frosting with cream cheese icing.
